name: Cascade Failure
description: Ley lines across the Reach are destabilizing, causing cascading magical failures. A faction is deliberately amplifying the instability to tear open the barrier between worlds and summon something through.
finaleDungeonFeel: A shattered observatory where geometry no longer obeys natural laws. Corridors loop back on themselves. Gravity shifts without warning. Crystallized mana hangs in the air like frozen lightning. At the center, a rift pulses with an eye that watches from beyond.

events.name: Spell Accidents Multiply
events.description: Mishaps with basic spells are becoming common across the Reach.

events.name: Growing Instability
events.description: The ley line disruptions are getting worse. Mages report headaches and visions.

events.name: Reality Tear
events.description: A tear in reality has opened briefly near the Hollow. Something looked through.

events.name: Afflicted Mages
events.description: Mages exposed to the instability have gone mad or vanished.

events.name: Ley Line Nexus Discovered
events.description: scouts have mapped the convergence point of the destabilized ley lines.

events.name: Convergence Event
events.description: The ley lines are converging. The barrier between worlds is thinning dangerously.

events.name: The Nexus
events.description: The rift anchor has been found. It must be severed before the summoning completes.
